# The Witcher

Monsters: Beasts (../Monsters%20and%20Villains/Beasts%203fefb3b547bb4b4985c3ef149b16290a.md), Curses (../Monsters%20and%20Villains/Curses%208d8f367d6fdd47a580868227f4274a51.md), Supervillains (../Monsters%20and%20Villains/Supervillains%20e279a3db427941fea851e6a6e016ec61.md)
Motivations: Cursed by manifestations of their sin (../../Features/Cursed%20by%20manifestations%20of%20their%20sin%20e6b7f4b5115f49f18d304c4660f5cbfb.md), The Agency (../../Features/The%20Agency%2044db7ec455e14b10a9bc1da088f20f66.md), Hidden monsters living amongst us (../../Features/Hidden%20monsters%20living%20amongst%20us%20c2e7213525474f8bb2f8718d0f6cb2f1.md), Dark forest (../../Features/Dark%20forest%20181a3aae0f4b4056b6c28bb49e27978e.md), Adventure (../../Features/Adventure%201d458e628ba28026830dfe3db74cba19.md), Free spirited / adaptable main characters (../../Features/Free%20spirited%20adaptable%20main%20characters%201d458e628ba2803d9f73cd30fd59b6ef.md), Sojourner (../../Features/Sojourner%201e2cf9c7997f48f7bf052c4ee98aec4b.md), Fantasy misconceptions (../../Features/Fantasy%20misconceptions%202dc58e628ba280f3a572db81b08bfe74.md)
Pacing: Continuous (../Pacing%20types/Continuous%20e187a8c9a0cf44aea652648d5970a0db.md)
Plot is driven by MC desire: False
Story scale: Extended story (../Story%20scales/Extended%20story%2086324f5585d84ca0a6a36deafd6b91fc.md)
Traversal reasons: Finding work (../Traversal%20reasons/Finding%20work%20632e6e24e59d4945a49be5afffbc308a.md)
Traversal types: Roaming (../Traversal%20types/Roaming%201c6d9213c2aa449390613c20f6f4d71d.md)
Type: Book (../Inspiration%20types/Book%20e76b1047e9d44c01a00ccdeea97cd346.md)
Weighted Use: 13
Wonder: 2

For all of its high fantasy, the Witcher stories are remarkably grounded and consistent in their depiction of a general contractor, and a good template for [The Agency](../../Features/The%20Agency%2044db7ec455e14b10a9bc1da088f20f66.md).
